insight: Poker and weed streaks are holding at 7 days clean — the hardest weekly goals are locked in. Deep work hit 5 of the last 6 days and your Wim Hof AM streak is perfect. Eating clean dropped off the last 3 days (26-28 all missed) and sleep is 4/7 — with Poland in 3 days, today's weekly check-in is the right moment to reset those two levers before travel disrupts routine.
planInsight: Light day: one deep work block and a weigh-in. You slept well last night — use that energy for a focused 90-minute session, then let the weekly check-in close out the week before the Poland transition.
priorities: Deep work block 9:30–11 — protect the 5/6 streak
Weigh-in + weekly check-in — assess the week and set Poland ground rules
Eat clean today — break the 3-day miss streak
Bed by 9:30pm — sleep consistency is the weakest link at 4/7

quote.text: Thought allied fearlessly to purpose becomes creative force. He who knows this is ready to become something higher and stronger than a mere bundle of wavering thoughts and fluctuating sensations.
quote.author: James Allen
